name: CC Coins Jewelry & Loan
description_short: CC Coins Jewelry & Loan is a pawn shop in Wyandotte, MI specializing in jewelry, coins, electronics, and musical instruments with collateral-based lending.
description_long:
CC Coins Jewelry & Loan operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 1325 Fort St. in Wyandotte, Michigan. The business maintains standard pawn shop hours (Monday-Saturday 9am-7pm, closed Sundays) and can be reached at (734) 258-7920. Based on their online presence through the Buya marketplace, the company functions as both a retailer of secondhand goods and a collateral-based lender.

The company's primary offerings include buying, selling, and lending against jewelry (rings, chains, necklaces, bracelets, earrings, pendants, watches), coins and currency, electronics (televisions, computers, laptops, cameras, cell phones, home audio equipment), musical instruments (guitars, drums, brass instruments, woodwinds), sporting goods (bicycles, fishing equipment, golf clubs), and tools (power drills, automotive tools, air tools).

What distinguishes CC Coins is their focus on precious metals and collectibles—particularly jewelry and coins—which aligns with their name and suggests expertise in assessing precious metal content and value. Their extensive catalog across multiple merchandise categories indicates they accept a wide range of collateral types, potentially appealing to customers with diverse items to pawn or sell.

As a pawn shop, CC Coins serves the immediate liquidity needs of customers willing to pledge personal property as collateral. However, the website provides no details about loan terms, interest rates, repayment periods, or lending policies. Customers should contact the store directly to understand specific loan conditions and whether they meet eligibility requirements.
pros: Specializes in precious metals and jewelry valuation with detailed categories for gold, silver, platinum, and diamonds
Accepts diverse collateral types including electronics, musical instruments, sporting goods, and tools
Operates in Wyandotte, MI with accessible hours (9am-7pm Mon-Sat) and direct phone contact available
Actively maintains online marketplace presence through Buya with auction listings and detailed product categories
Focuses on coins and collectibles, suggesting expertise in numismatic and precious metal assessment
Offers both pawn loans and retail purchase options for customers buying or selling items
cons: Website provides no information about loan terms, APR, repayment periods, or lending policies
No details available regarding minimum/maximum loan amounts or collateral eligibility requirements
Limited online transparency about business practices, customer reviews, or complaint history
Closed on Sundays, limiting accessibility for customers with weekend-only availability
No information about how loan payoff, renewal, or item redemption processes work
best_for: Customers in Wyandotte, MI needing quick cash and willing to pledge jewelry or precious metals
Individuals looking to buy secondhand electronics, musical instruments, or sporting goods locally
Coin and collectibles enthusiasts seeking professional appraisal and sale of precious metal items
People with immediate liquidity needs who have valuable items but limited alternative financing options
diagnosis: CC Coins Jewelry & Loan is best for Wyandotte-area residents with valuable jewelry, coins, electronics, or musical instruments who need immediate cash and are comfortable using collateral-based lending. The primary caveat is complete lack of online transparency regarding loan terms—customers must visit in person or call to understand interest rates, repayment periods, and specific lending requirements.
services: Pawn loans against jewelry, watches, and precious metal items
Purchase and sale of gold, silver, platinum, and diamond jewelry
Buying and selling of coins and paper currency
Electronics pawn and retail (televisions, computers, laptops, cameras, phones)
Musical instrument pawn and retail (guitars, drums, brass, woodwind instruments)
Sporting goods pawn and retail (bicycles, fishing equipment, golf clubs)
Tools pawn and retail (power drills, automotive tools, air tools)
Buya marketplace platform presence for item browsing and purchase
In-store collateral-based lending against personal property
